description: Configure network security for the WeatherApp Android project to prepare it for production. Create a Network Security Configuration file at `app/src/main/res/xml/network_security_config.xml` that disables cleartext traffic globally but allows it for the development domain `10.0.2.2`. For the production domain `api.weatherstack.com` (including subdomains), implement certificate pinning expiring `2025-12-31` with pins `sha256/wJMSn8tj/kCPBXNRsKPJFJvfMM1bFBvLFHlRFiEPbdI=` and `sha256/x9SZw6TwIqfmVLRDEmFi2yJTMlfn0CfVB3as3wSckOM=`. Include debug overrides to trust user-added CA certificates. Update `app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` to reference this configuration and ensure the project builds successfully.
